summary: Static compatibility boundary for Quasar demo mode. Final Colosseum success requires every demo-critical on-chain path to be Quasar-native; scoped proof is not sufficient.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: shared Quasar instruction-data builders for registry/reputation/attestation
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Uses one-byte Quasar discriminators and fixed-size argument layouts from Quasar parity source/tests. Does not claim PER compatibility.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: Quasar transaction-instruction helpers for registry, reputation, and attestation
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Wraps shared Quasar instruction data with account metas/order from Quasar parity source/tests for registry, reputation commit/reveal, and attestation confirm/dispute.
Selects Quasar registry wrapper when PROGRAM_TARGET is quasar; preserves Anchor builder only for legacy-anchor mode.
Constructs demo-agent register instructions with Quasar register data when PROGRAM_TARGET is quasar and preserves Anchor encoding for legacy mode.
Selects Quasar attest_quality wrapper/data when PROGRAM_TARGET is quasar; preserves Anchor builder only for legacy mode.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: shared instruction builders and account decoders
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Exports target-aware Quasar AgentAccount decode/filter constants for read paths; legacy Anchor builders remain available only for legacy-anchor callers while demo-critical Quasar transaction paths route through lib/quasar wrappers.

Registration transaction construction now routes through target-aware `buildAgentRegistrationInstruction`, using Quasar registry wrapper/data in explicit Quasar mode and Anchor data only in legacy mode.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: onboarding registration and attestation confirmation/dispute builders
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Onboarding registration and attestation confirmation/dispute construction now select Quasar wrappers in explicit Quasar mode while preserving Anchor builders only for legacy mode.
Onboarding attest_quality construction now routes through target-aware helper and uses Quasar one-byte/fixed-size attestation data in explicit Quasar mode; send remains operator-triggered only.
Commit/reveal reputation construction now selects Quasar wrappers/data in explicit Quasar mode while preserving Anchor IX builders only for legacy mode.
Uses active target account discriminator/data-size constants and target-aware AgentAccount decode; Quasar mode filters one-byte discriminator 20 and fixed-size Quasar AgentAccount layout.
Uses active target account discriminator/data-size constants and target-aware AgentAccount decode; Quasar mode no longer applies Anchor memcmp/data-size filters.
Demo-agent registration now routes through target-aware helper using Quasar fixed-size one-byte register data in explicit Quasar mode; send remains operator-triggered only.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: full demo-agent A→B→C escrow/reputation/attestation/MagicBlock PER transaction flow
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Critical success factor: final demo cannot exclude this path as legacy-only. It must be ported to Quasar-native program IDs/instruction layouts or replaced with an equivalent Quasar-native full-flow demo before submissionReady can be true.

submissionReadyRule: submissionReady may not be true until every demo-critical on-chain path is Quasar-native and the full A→B→C escrow/settlement/MagicBlock PER claim is either validated on Quasar or removed from final claims.
